boundary.title: Runtime Python Rust Hot Path Delivery Boundary

features.description: Track Python runtime conformance to the runtime-wide rule that DDL and schema readiness occur during initialization, bootstrap, migration, or explicit DDL/admin work rather than ordinary request execution.
features.title: Python runtime DDL initialization boundary

features.description: Track Rust runtime conformance to the runtime-wide rule that DDL and schema readiness occur during initialization, bootstrap, migration, or explicit DDL/admin work rather than ordinary request execution.
features.title: Rust runtime DDL initialization boundary

features.description: Prove that ordinary Python CRUD request execution does not call create_all, migrations, implicit bootstrap, schema reflection, table creation, or index creation.
features.title: Python request hot path excludes DDL

features.description: Prove that ordinary Rust CRUD request execution does not run DDL or schema readiness work such as SQLite table or index creation inside request transactions.
features.title: Rust request hot path excludes DDL

features.description: Track Python behavior when schema readiness is missing, requiring clear fail-closed runtime or configuration errors outside explicit development auto-initialization.
features.title: Python schema readiness fail-closed behavior

features.description: Track Rust behavior when schema readiness is missing, requiring clear fail-closed runtime or configuration errors outside explicit development auto-initialization.
features.title: Rust schema readiness fail-closed behavior

features.description: Track Python engine/session lifecycle separation across engine initialization, schema readiness, session acquisition, transaction begin, execution, commit or rollback, and disposal.
features.title: Python engine session lifecycle separation

features.description: Track Rust engine/session lifecycle separation across engine initialization, schema readiness, session acquisition, transaction begin, execution, commit or rollback, and disposal.
features.title: Rust engine session lifecycle separation

features.description: Track Python transaction hot-path evidence that ordinary request work is limited to session use, transaction begin, operation execution, commit or rollback, and resource release.
features.title: Python transaction hot path evidence

features.description: Track Rust transaction hot-path optimization and evidence that request work avoids per-request engine construction and schema readiness work.
features.title: Rust transaction hot path optimization

features.description: Record the Python executor benchmark baseline used for comparable runtime performance claims and Rust 2x target evaluation.
features.title: Python executor benchmark baseline

features.description: Record the Rust executor benchmark baseline used for comparable runtime performance claims against Python executor and FastAPI lanes.
features.title: Rust executor benchmark baseline

features.description: Track Python executor callgraph export artifacts, including full function tables, edge tables, and rank/order columns for diagnostic hot-spot review.
features.title: Python executor callgraph export

features.description: Track Rust executor callgraph export artifacts, including full function tables, edge tables, and rank/order columns for diagnostic hot-spot review.
features.title: Rust executor callgraph export

features.description: Track a direct Python runtime or executor microbenchmark lane that separates runtime cost from Uvicorn, httpx, and ASGI overhead.
features.title: Python direct runtime microbenchmark lane

features.description: Track a direct Rust runtime handle microbenchmark lane that separates Rust runtime and storage cost from Uvicorn, httpx, and ASGI overhead.
features.title: Rust direct runtime microbenchmark lane

features.description: Track Python request envelope semantics for body parsing, response status and body shaping, and error propagation under supported runtime paths.
features.title: Python request envelope contract

features.description: Track Rust request envelope semantics across current JSON string bridge compatibility and future native PyO3 mapping, bytes, or response-object paths.
features.title: Rust request envelope contract

features.description: Track Python ASGI scope, receive, and send boundary evidence under Uvicorn for comparable runtime performance and semantic claims.
features.title: Python ASGI boundary evidence

features.description: Track Rust executor evidence under Uvicorn showing that Python ASGI scope bridging remains in the path while PyO3 and Rust runtime costs are measured separately.
features.title: Rust executor under Python ASGI boundary evidence

features.description: Track the Python executor baseline used to evaluate any claim that the Rust executor reaches at least 2x Python throughput under comparable benchmark conditions.
features.title: Python baseline for Rust 2x comparison

features.description: Track the Rust executor target and evidence requirements for reaching at least 2x Python executor throughput under comparable benchmark conditions.
features.title: Rust executor 2x Python throughput target
